heading: I make Web and Mobile Apps.

stories.p: I'm a Software Engineer at Unimedia Technology, where I make full scalable Web as well as Mobile Applications with technologies like C# .NET, Blazor WASM, ReactJS, NextJS, Swift, Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. Every project gets me to learn something new, a new tool, framework or architecture problem to solve.

I'm adaptable at implementing Docker based containers and providing DevOps solutions on platforms like Microsoft Azure, AWS and CI/CD pipelines. I also self host a few of my own platforms on a home server, as I like to understand the full stack from the bottom up.
I sketch in Figma before I touch the editor. I'm able to deliver user-centric solutions focusing on performance, security and maintainability.

I'm a good team player with experience in Agile Environments, using tools like Jira and Git to ensure proper coordination of multiple projects among team members. Programming is my passion, it lets me keep learning and solve problems at ease.

I love space, I love science. I watch a lot of YouTube videos on astrophysics, cosmology, black holes, quantum physics and new research. I also kind of think we live in a simulation, and the more I read about it, the more interesting it gets.
My favourite movies are The Matrix trilogy, Inception and Interstellar. My favourite series is Mr. Robot.
